findings.evidence: `Mathlib/Algebra/Squarefree/Basic.lean:41` defines `Squarefree [Monoid R]`; `Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Even.lean:57` defines `IsSquare` using only multiplication; `Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Units/Defs.lean:414` has `IsUnit.mul` under `[Monoid M]`. The proof at line 25 only uses `ha r dvd_rfl` and `.mul`, so commutativity is unused.
findings.fix: Generalize the signature to `theorem Squarefree.not_isSquare {R : Type*} [Monoid R] {a : R} ...` and adjust the docstring from "commutative monoid" to "monoid".
findings.issue: `Squarefree.not_isSquare` assumes `[CommMonoid R]`, but the statement and proof only need a monoid.

summary: The relocated lemma is useful, but its new algebra-level signature keeps an unnecessary commutativity assumption. At this level it should match the monoid generality of `Squarefree` itself.
